structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Zone State Primary Airflow Setpoint Mapping
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Map cooling-loop output to active primary airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature from air handler exceeds room temperature, limit primary airflow to minimum endpoint and series fan airflow to OA-min.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling-loop output mapped to active primary airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. If AHU SAT > room temperature, primary airflow setpoint ≤ minimum endpoint and series fan airflow setpoint ≤ OA-min.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint and the series fan airflow setpoint shall be no higher than OA-min.

evidence_quote: a. The cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint and the series fan airflow setpoint shall be no higher than OA-min.
evidence_text: a. The cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint and the series fan airflow setpoint shall be no higher than OA-min.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Zone State Series Fan Airflow Setpoint Mapping
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Map cooling-loop output to series fan airflow setpoint from the larger of OA-min and primary airflow minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling Loop output mapped to series fan airflow setpoint from max(OA-min, primary airflow minimum endpoint) to cooling maximum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. The Cooling Loop output shall be mapped to the series fan airflow setpoint from the larger of OA-min and the primary airflow minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint.

evidence_quote: b. The Cooling Loop output shall be mapped to the series fan airflow setpoint from the larger of OA-min and the primary airflow minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint.
evidence_text: b. The Cooling Loop output shall be mapped to the series fan airflow setpoint from the larger of OA-min and the primary airflow minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: Primary airflow setpoint equals the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Zone State Second Stage: Series Fan Airflow Reset
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: From 50% to 100% heating loop output, reset series fan airflow setpoint from OA-min to Sfan-htgmax. Primary airflow setpoint remains minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating and Heating Loop output 50% to 100%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Series fan airflow setpoint reset from OA-min to Sfan-htgmax. Active primary airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. From 50% to 100%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the series fan airflow setpoint from OA-min to a Sfan-htgmax. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: b. From 50% to 100%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the series fan airflow setpoint from OA-min to a Sfan-htgmax. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
evidence_text: b. From 50% to 100%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the series fan airflow setpoint from OA-min to a Sfan-htgmax. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Heating coil modulated to maintain discharge temperature at setpoint. Direct control from zone temperature loop is not acceptable.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. (Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. (Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).

evidence_quote: c. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. (Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).

structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: VAV damper modulated to maintain measured airflow at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Always
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured airflow at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.10.5.4. The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured airflow at setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Series Fan Run and Start Sequence
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fan runs whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Before starting fan, damper is driven fully closed to prevent backward rotation. After fan proven ON for 15 seconds, damper override is released.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone in heating or cooling Zone State, or Zone Group in Occupied Mode
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Fan shall run. Prior to starting fan, damper driven fully closed. Once fan proven ON for 15 seconds, damper override released.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.10.5.5. Fan Control. Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is not rotating backward. Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.

evidence_quote: 5.10.5.5. Fan Control. Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is not rotating backward. Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.
evidence_text: 5.10.5.5. Fan Control. Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is not rotating backward. Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Primary Airflow Alarm Level 4
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 4 alarm if measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0.

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
evidence_text: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 3 alarm if fan OFF and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan OFF and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow sensor reading above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes while fan is OFF
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.10.6.4. Airflow Sensor Calibration. If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: 5.10.6.4. Airflow Sensor Calibration. If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
evidence_text: 5.10.6.4. Airflow Sensor Calibration. If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches interlocked to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin; force damper full closed/open; force heating OFF/closed; turn fan ON/OFF; reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Commissioning override activation
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Software switches shall force the listed overrides.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, force damper full closed/open, force heating to OFF/closed, turn fan ON/OFF, and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.10.7. Testing/Commissioning Overrides. Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, e. force heating to OFF/closed, f. turn fan ON/OFF, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: 5.10.7. Testing/Commissioning Overrides. Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, e. force heating to OFF/closed, f. turn fan ON/OFF, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
evidence_text: 5.10.7. Testing/Commissioning Overrides. Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, e. force heating to OFF/closed, f. turn fan ON/OFF, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send 3 requests if zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes after suppression period; send 2 requests if exceeds by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes; send 1 request if Cooling Loop > 95% until < 85%; else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Various zone temperature and cooling loop conditions
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send requests as described based on zone temperature deviation and cooling loop output.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote: a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
evidence_text: a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send 3 requests if measured airflow < 50% of setpoint while setpoint > 0 and damper position > 95% for 1 minute.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint, setpoint > 0, damper position > 95% for 1 minute
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 3 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.

evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.
evidence_text: a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.
